---
name: generate-rich-report
description: "Generate a rich multi-format report (JSON, Markdown, HTML) for a single Android screen capture using repository templates."
---

# Generate Rich Report

Create a synchronized JSON, Markdown, and HTML report set for one screen capture.

## Rules

1. JSON is canonical.
2. Markdown and HTML must match canonical counts and metadata.
3. Include element table with depth, bounds, and interaction flags.
4. Include diagnostic section and known limitations.
